requirements.note: Uraume vessel preferred. Ancient freezing CE via breath or touch.

abilities.name: Frost Calm
abilities.description: Exhale freezing mist solidifying into thick ice columns.

mechanics.special_effect: AoE crowd control. Instantly freezes groups. High effectiveness vs multiple targets.

abilities.name: Icefall
abilities.description: Telekinetic spiked ice shards rain from the ground.

mechanics.special_effect: Floating icicles skewer and freeze on impact. Can near-wipe squads.
